=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:21-8:3) TS377036: This `Schema.Struct` includes a `_tag` field. `Schema.TaggedStruct` is the tagged-struct form for this pattern and makes the tag optional in the constructor. effect(schemaStructWithTag)
  Fix 0: "Disable schemaStructWithTag for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable schemaStructWithTag for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as Schema.TaggedStruct"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable schemaStructWithTag for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable schemaStructWithTag for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Rewrite as Schema.TaggedStruct" ===

--- file:///.src/schemaStructWithTag.ts ---
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

// this should trigger because this is a Schema.Struct with a _tag field
export const User = Schema.TaggedStruct("User", { name: Schema.String, age: Schema.Finite })

// so it can be rewritten as follows
export const UserWithTag = Schema.TaggedStruct("User", {
  name: Schema.String,
  age: Schema.Finite
})

export const OtherWithoutTag = Schema.Struct({
  name: Schema.String,
  age: Schema.Finite
})
